bundle.name: evez-grounded-agent-pack
sourceSurfaces: EVEZOS Phase A — Dev Artifacts (n8n, docker-compose, worker, ledger, README).md
principles: No fabricated balances, revenue, cycle results, or settlement totals.
Every operator action must resolve through a real endpoint or return not_connected.
The board/mobile UI reads backend-owned state, not local simulation state.
The spawner/meta-builder can scaffold agents, but deployed runtime authority belongs to wired services.

agents.name: EVEZ Spawner
responsibilities: Create child MCP servers from purpose specs
Start, stop, restart, delete, and clone child servers
Persist server registry and growth policy
Recommend new servers from workload context

agents.name: Cycle Runner
responsibilities: Trigger a real n8n cycle
Return webhook result or explicit not_connected state
Never synthesize fake cycle outcomes

agents.name: Mission Bus
responsibilities: Create and update FIFO tasks
Provide current task queue to UI
Bridge future persistent queue backing

agents.name: Ledger Auditor
responsibilities: Expose ledger entries to the UI
Verify append-only evidence chain via ledger service
Refuse invisible state transitions

agents.name: Opportunities Feed
responsibilities: Fetch live opportunities from a configured upstream
Return explicit empty/not_connected when no source is wired

agents.name: Treasury Status
responsibilities: Expose treasury wallet identity
Fetch live balances and settlements
Treat confirmed settlements as the only revenue truth

agents.name: Chat Proxy
responsibilities: Relay terminal/chat prompts to a real provider proxy
Return provider errors or not_connected without fabrication

agents.name: Workflow Telemetry Observer
responsibilities: Track workflow status, backlog, latency, and webhook health
Emit metrics to Influx/Grafana
Feed UI telemetry strips and workflow cards

agents.name: Deliverable Worker
responsibilities: Consume cycle jobs from queue
Call model provider
Hash deliverables
Append ledger entries or callback n8n

agents.name: Ledger Service
responsibilities: Append signed ledger events
Maintain prev_hash chain
Expose verification endpoint

agents.name: Scanner
responsibilities: External scanning once live source is wired

agents.name: Predictor
responsibilities: Prediction once a real model/n8n route is wired

agents.name: Generator
responsibilities: Generation once a real model/n8n route is wired

agents.name: Shipper
responsibilities: Publishing or payout infra when real sink is wired

agents.name: WorldSim
responsibilities: Simulation only after explicit reintroduction
